rows.label: tev022601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev022601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Liviana about ground gear.

rows.label: tev022601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev022601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Liviana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev022601_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Liviana about her
experiences with the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev022601_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Liviana about conditions
during the enemy attack.

rows.label: tev022601_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Liviana for her thoughts on Elma.

rows.label: tev022601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Liviana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev022601_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Liviana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0001
rows.name:
My shop sells a wide variety
of men's and women's attire.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0002
rows.name:
However, it's merely conventional clothing. We
don't carry the protective armor or "ground
gear" worn by BLADE operatives like yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0003
rows.name:
If that's what you're in the market
for, you should go to Armory Alley
in the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0004
rows.name:
I went there once myself out of
curiosity—they were selling items
from a wide variety of manufacturers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0005
rows.name:
I was impressed at how risqué a lot
of the ground gear for women was! Not
that I could hope to pull it off...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Lately I have been thinking
a lot about my family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0009
rows.name:
My daughter will turn 20 this
year, although she's currently
asleep in the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ever since she was a little girl, she
always took such good care of the
clothes and jewelry I bought her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0011
rows.name:
On her birthday, she'd always ask me
to pick out a present that I thought
looked nice. Isn't that sweet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0012
rows.name:
So I bought a lovely outfit
here for her 20th birthday.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0013
rows.name:
But if we don't find the Central Life,
I'll never be able to give it to her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Oh, please go out and find the Core! You
must bring my daughter home to NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0019
rows.name:
I've had Ma-non coming
into my shop recently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0020
rows.name:
The women were quite disappointed
that none of our clothes fit them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0021
rows.name:
And the men didn't show interest in our clothes at all.
They said they were "so so weak and flimsy, with no
protective value." ...Although rather more meekly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0022
rows.name:
They may be xenoforms, but it's
funny how they're no different
from humans in that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0027
rows.name:
I don't need to ask what it was like here during
the attack, because I played back the footage
from the store's outer security camera.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0028
rows.name:
I've never seen enemies like that before. The
way they walked through the streets was terrifying.
And whenever they saw a BLADE operative...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0029
rows.name:
I just can't imagine hell being
any worse than the streets of
NLA during that attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0030
rows.name:
We're truly lucky to have
survived. And not just me and
you, but this entire city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0035
rows.name:
I saw those two famous BLADE
operatives, Elma and Iriina,
shopping at a store near here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0036
rows.name:
I was shocked at how drastically
Elma had changed her image![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG0037
rows.name:
It made me wonder if maybe she has a secret? Perhaps
she used the Lifepod that strange man in the administrative
district's lowest level was talking about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1001
rows.name:
One of my saleswomen, Dorothy,
has found herself a boyfriend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1002
rows.name:
They seem to be very happy together, and
they're already talking about marriage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1003
rows.name:
Still, I can't help but think of my daughter, who
is sleeping in the Central Life, when I see Dorothy
so happy. They're the same age, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1004
rows.name:
But of course I'm happy for Dorothy! And if
they do get married, I'll make sure to give
her the best wedding dress in the shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1005
rows.name:
Hopefully this will be the
start of a lovely family...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1011
rows.name:
Dorothy is so miserable that it hurts
to even think about her situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1012
rows.name:
She said she and her boyfriend
wanted to get married, so I put
aside a wedding dress for her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1013
rows.name:
But then her beau... He
died in the line of duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022601_MSG1014
rows.name:
She reminds me so much of my daughter
who's asleep in the Central Life. I
just wanted her to be happy.[ST:wait ]
